title: pelargonium × vestifluum
intro: Pelargonium × vestitum, also known as 'Lion's Tail', is a species of flowering plant that is a hybrid of the genus Pelargonium. It is a type of succulent that is native to South Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, sore throats, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × vestitum are often extracted and prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
